panels.description: High angle wide shot: A massive, chaotic stampede of thousands of Victorian refugees clogging a wide country road, seen from a distance like a river of black dots. Dust clouds rise from the frantic crowd, afternoon lighting.

bubbles.text: A stampede gigantic and terrible—without order and without a goal, six million people unarmed and unprovisioned, driving headlong.

panels.description: Wide shot aerial view: A map-like perspective of London's cityscape. Inky, viscous black smoke is spreading across the streets and neighborhoods like a growing stain on blotting paper.

bubbles.text: It was as if some monstrous pen had flung ink upon the chart. Steadily, each black splash grew and spread.

panels.description: Wide shot: Giant three-legged Martian machines (tripods) stand tall on the horizon, their metallic surfaces glittering. They are systematically destroying railway lines and telegraph poles under a grey, smoke-filled sky.

bubbles.text: The glittering Martians went to and fro, methodically spreading their poison cloud... hamstringing mankind.

panels.description: Wide shot: The Pool of London, dark choppy water. Victorian steamboats are crowded with desperate people. In the foreground, people in the water are being thrust off the boats with long wooden boathooks. Thick black vapor looms in the background.

bubbles.text: At the Pool of London, fugitives who swam out to vessels were thrust off with boathooks and drowned.

panels.description: Wide shot: A dark evening meadow. A Victorian chaise (carriage) is parked. In the far distance beyond the silhouetted hills, a brilliant, eerie green meteor-like flash illuminates the night sky.

bubbles.text: My brother, keeping watch beside the women, saw the green flash of the sixth star far beyond the hills.

panels.description: Medium shot: Inside the horse-drawn carriage, the brother and two women look exhausted and terrified. The carriage is surrounded by a dense, slow-moving crowd of other fugitives on a muddy road.

bubbles.text: The news that the Martians were now in possession of the whole of London was confirmed.

panels.description: Medium wide shot: A group of grim-faced Victorian farmers stand guard in front of a wooden granary, holding shotguns defensively. In the foreground, hungry and desperate refugees are shouting and gesturing towards them in a tense standoff.

bubbles.text: As they grew hungry the rights of property ceased. Farmers were out to defend their cattle-sheds with arms in their hands.
